channel.title: Bryce Maxheimer Blog
channel.description: Investigations, framework deep-dives, and writeups from Bryce Maxheimer.

item.title: Inside Invoke-KqlPS
item.description: Why I built a KQL interpreter in PowerShell, what subset it supports today, and how it anchors the rest of the lab.

item.title: MITRE Crosswalks in the Lab
item.description: How the local ATT&CK explorer, CVE-to-technique mappings, and KQL tooling fit together in one offline-friendly workflow.

item.title: Welcome to the lab
item.description: Why I'm publishing in the open, how this site is built, and what's coming next.
